response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad individual contributor with 20+ years of engineering experience, genuine distributed-systems depth (Sociomantic's real-time microservices at scale), and some recent exposure to agentic AI tooling at re:cinq. However, the role demands a seasoned executive: demonstrated team scaling from 10 to 30+ engineers, ownership of engineering org design, board-level communication, and production leadership of multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments. None of these are evidenced in the resume. His entire career is framed at the Senior/Staff individual-contributor level, AI agent involvement is described as a supporting contributor rather than an architect, and there is no meaningful fintech infrastructure depth in credit, working capital, or compliance systems.
strengths: Deep distributed-systems and real-time backend experience, including high-throughput microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing awareness of the space
Long track record shipping across diverse stacks and domains, demonstrating adaptability and technical range
concerns: No executive, VP, or CTO-level experience; career is entirely individual-contributor, with no evidence of scaling or leading an engineering organization
AI agent involvement is described in a supporting/contributor capacity, not as an architect or technical decision-maker for production agentic systems

No demonstrated experience with fintech-specific infrastructure — credit risk, working-capital management, payment flows, regulatory compliance — which the JD lists as a meaningful advantage requirement

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and real-time backend depth
